Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class HealthRecord.Encounter

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord.Entry
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord.Encounter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
HealthRecord
public class HealthRecord.Encounter extends HealthRecord.Entry
Represents a single encounter in a person's health record.
See Also:

      Time when the encounter ended.

      public boolean chronicMedsRenewed
      Track if we renewed meds at this encounter. Used in State.java encounter state.

      public String clinicalNote
      Clinical note associated with the encounter.

  • Constructor Details

    • Encounter

      public Encounter(long time, String type)
      Construct an encounter.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the encounter.
      type - the type of the encounter.

  • Method Details

    • addObservation

      public HealthRecord.Observation addObservation(long time, String type, Object value)
      Add an observation to the encounter. In this case, no codes are added to the observation. It appears that some code in Synthea likes it this way (and does not like good old OO-style encapsulation).
      Parameters:
      time - The time of the observation
      type - The type of the observation
      value - The observation value
      Returns:
      The newly created observation.

    • addObservation

      public HealthRecord.Observation addObservation(long time, String type, Object value, String display)
      Add an observation to the encounter and uses the type to set the first code.
      Parameters:
      time - The time of the observation
      type - The LOINC code for the observation
      value - The observation value
      display - The display text for the first code
      Returns:
      The newly created observation.

    • findObservation

      public HealthRecord.Observation findObservation(String code)
      Find the first observation in the encounter with the given LOINC code.
      Parameters:
      code - The LOINC code to look for.
      Returns:
      A single observation or null if none exists.

    • previousEncounter

      public HealthRecord.Encounter previousEncounter()
      Find the encounter that happened before this one.
      Returns:
      The previous encounter or null if this is the first.

    • end

      public void end(long time)
      End the encounter.
      Parameters:
      time - The time of the simulation.
